editor.notProbedYet: This video hasn't been probed yet — wait for ffprobe to finish before editing.

detail.transcriptUnavailable: No subtitles available for this video
detail.transcriptRateLimited: YouTube rate-limited the transcript request. Try refreshing again later.

missing.title: This video appears unavailable on YouTube
missing.body: The last refresh returned a 404 or 403. The local file is still here. Retry to check whether the channel is back.

transcript.title: Auto-transcript
transcript.noneDescriptionEnriched: This video has no auto-generated captions.
transcript.noneDescriptionNotEnriched: Click “Fetch metadata” to retrieve the auto-generated transcript.

comments.ctaWithCount: This video has {{count}} comments. Click below to fetch them — may take 30–60s for popular videos.
comments.ctaWithoutCount: Click below to fetch comments from YouTube. May take 30–60s for popular videos.
comments.loadingHint: This may take 30–60 seconds for popular videos.
comments.loadMoreHint: Fetches the next batch from YouTube.
comments.fetchAllHint: May take several minutes for popular videos.
comments.loadingMoreHint: Re-scrapes from YouTube up to the requested cap. Existing comments stay on screen until the new batch lands.

move.title: Move {{count}} video(s) to a creator
move.description: Select a destination creator. Files on disk are moved automatically.
